name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Regular Endpoint Administration
notes: This Building Block defines Regular Administration Activity such as User Management, Download file in command line, Execution with Elevated Privilege.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Hidden File or Folder Created
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Multiple File Deletions on Endpoint System
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Regular Endpoint Administration on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Run as Superuser or Another User (Unix)
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Run as Superuser or Another User (Windows)
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Admin Privileges Added (Unix), BB:BehaviorDefinition: Admin Privileges Added (Windows), BB:BehaviorDefinition: Admin Privileges Removed (Windows), BB:BehaviorDefinition: Download Utilities in Events, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Group or Account Discovery, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Hidden File or Folder Created, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Password Policy Discovery (Unix), BB:BehaviorDefinition: Password Policy Discovery (Windows), BB:BehaviorDefinition: Run as Superuser or Another User (Unix), BB:BehaviorDefinition: Run as Superuser or Another User (Windows), BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Account Added (Unix), BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Account Added (Windows), BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Account Deleted (Unix), BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Account Deleted (Windows), BB:CategoryDefinition: File Permission Changed, BB:BehaviorDefinition: PowerShell File Download Activity, BB:BehaviorDefinition: PowerShell File Upload Activity, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Directory Discovery (Windows), BB:BehaviorDefinition: Repeated Nslookup Usage, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Hostname or Network Discovery, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Multiple File Deletions on Endpoint System, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Directory Discovery (Unix), BB:BehaviorDefinition: Administrative Share Accessed
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Regular Endpoint Administration on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
